title: easy lofi
description: adds 16 lofi discs to the game and a bonus one
body:
craft lofi discs with concrete and one is very hard to get. Here are some discs being played:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/HG4Of59aBDA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe> relax with some lofi music discs being played!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! side note two (or three) are still in beta.
